hero_title_accent: For VASP KYC and KYB Onboarding
hero_subtitle: SFTY connects document verification providers into a single compliance workflow that structures onboarding reviews, routes risk-based checks, and preserves audit-ready evidence for VASPs.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Onboarding slows when document checks disconnect
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays and duplicated effort when document verification outputs remain siloed across multiple providers. This fragmentation weakens audit trails and complicates consistent risk-based review during VASP onboarding workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates outputs from multiple document verification providers into one auditable onboarding workflow, enabling risk-based routing, consistent reviews, and clear preservation of approval and audit evidence.
workflow_title: From document checks to onboarding approval
workflow_description: SFTY orchestrates multiple document verification providers, routes verification results through risk-based reviews, case workflows and decision logs for controlled onboarding approval.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects multiple document verification providers into unified onboarding workflows with structured decisions, case evidence and audit-ready compliance control without replacing existing tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs requiring a secure, provider-neutral compliance layer that preserves audit evidence and enables scalable deployment for controlled onboarding workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support document verification provider orchestration
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how document checks integrate into onboarding workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how document verification results become audit evidence
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe risk-based routing for multi-provider document review
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY support document verification?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects document verification outputs into structured onboarding workflows, enabling risk-based routing, review, and decision logging while preserving evidence for compliance and audit purposes.
faq_2_question: Can SFTY orchestrate multiple document providers?
faq_2_answer: Yes. SFTY orchestrates multiple document verification providers, routing requests based on jurisdiction, risk, or client type within a single connected onboarding workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves onboarding evidence by capturing decision logs, provider results, and linked documents within an auditable case record accessible for review and regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: How does SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: SFTY integrates above existing KYC, KYB and screening tools, connecting their outputs into consistent workflows without replacing current systems, preserving data and decision integrity.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC or KYB providers; instead, it connects their outputs into one structured, auditable compliance layer for digital asset onboarding.
final_title: Connect document verification into controlled workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY structures document checks, routes risk-based reviews, and preserves audit-ready onboarding evidence for VASP compliance teams.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
